Rent Extraction vs. Rent Creation in Regulation Theory

Two types of intermediaries play fundamentally different roles in economic activity. One type creates value, the other distributes value. The criterion for distinguishing between them defines how we understand the source of real value in markets.
EconomyBusinessSociety

Time Moves Fast and Slow at the Same Time

Nearly every office worker experiences this split perception of time: the day flies by, yet every minute feels like it is dragging. There is a clear psychological mechanism behind this feeling.
PsychologyLifeSelf

Three Core Corporate Governance Dilemmas

Three common dilemmas in corporate governance all point to the same root cause: the mismatch between institutional design and human nature.
ManagementBusinessCareer

Rock n Roll Is More Important Than Cannons

If we use two sounds to metaphor the logic of social operation, cannons represent hard commands and rules, while rock n roll represents the impulse for expression and creation.
SocietyPhilosophy

About Me

My work is built on a core belief: every complex problem can be broken down through a clear logical framework, analysed efficiently with the help of AI, and turned into systematic solutions that are reusable and actionable.
